meta.title: An iron-regulated outer-membrane protein of Proteus mirabilis is a haem receptor that plays an important role in urinary tract infection and in in vivo growth

abstractHtml: Abbreviations: Amp, ampicillin; EDDHA, di-o-hydroxyphenylacetic acid; GaPPIX, gallium protoporphyrin IX; Hb, haemoglobin; Hm, haemin; IPC, intraperitoneal chamber; Km, kanamycin; OMP, outer-membrane protein; Tet, tetracycline; UTI, urinary tract infection.
